title: Decision
description: Represents the aggregated decision issued by the WatchLLM Kernel (Python internal shape).  For the cross‑component Wasm/CLI contract see `kernel_execution_result.json`.

decision.description: Top-level verdict of the kernel evaluation.

mode.description: Evaluation mode: enforce blocks on first FAIL, shadow records but allows.

file_path.description: Path of the evaluated file, or null for stdin evaluation.

rule_results.description: Per‑rule evaluation results (Python kernel internal shape).

decision.description: Per‑rule decision (INCONCLUSIVE for branch‑contained auth guards).
